---
title: "Lucas Hussey"
subtitle: "USF Student"
# `profile.jpg` photo by Jan Tinneberg on https://unsplash.com
image: Portrait.jpeg
about: # https://quarto.org/docs/websites/website-about.html
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/lucashussey
---

My name is Lucas and I am 21, I am a student at USF Majoring in Risk Management and Insurance. I also will be working at AIG as an underwriter for Construction & Energy after graduating.

## Education

University of South Florida, Tampa \| Sept 2022 - June 2026

## Experience

Home Inspector \| Independent Contractor \| April 2025 - present
